title: Employment
description: An Employment record representing a position an employee holds at a company, aligned with HRIS, unified-HRIS, and payroll APIs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the employment record.

employeeId.description: Identifier of the employee this employment record applies to.

remoteId.description: Identifier in the source HRIS or payroll system.

jobTitle.description: Job title for the employment record.

department.description: Department associated with this employment record.

workLocationId.description: Identifier of the work location for this employment record.

managerId.description: Employee id of the manager for this employment.

ftEquivalent.description: Full-time equivalent expressed as a fraction (1.0 = full-time).

payRate.description: Pay rate amount for this employment.

payCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the pay rate.

payPeriod.description: Period the pay rate is expressed over.

payFrequency.description: How often the employee is paid.

effectiveDate.description: Date this employment record becomes effective.

endDate.description: Date this employment record ends, if applicable.

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the employee's primary employment record.
